notes: This example uses the generated regression sample data for the Mark identity because it is the smallest verified local path in this workspace.
run_a2f3d_sdk_inference.py will compile tools/a2f3d_sdk_export.cpp on demand and will resample input audio to 16kHz mono before running the SDK bridge.
Use raw A2F output semantics; the hybrid pipeline will not renormalize MouthClose or synthesize eye motion.
